title: Views Menu Bar to extend the full page width
excerpt: Currently: The View Menu Bar just below the board name on a board page truncates about half way across the page resulting in only one or two view tabs appearing. The rest are hidden in the “More” drop menu. Before a few …

posts.author: matts (Matt S)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently: The View Menu Bar just below the board name on a board page truncates about half way across the page resulting in only one or two view tabs appearing. The rest are hidden in the “More” drop menu. Before a few weeks ago, up to six or seven favorited views would appear on the menu. (We spoke to support today and they said the current behavior is expected for the current version of Monday.com.)

Desired behavior: The Views Menu bar to display favorited views across the entire page width, allowing many more views to be displayed.

This is a minor change that has a big impact on quality of life of our project managers who switch between favorites views frequently when switching between workflows. Returning the behavior to the previous version of the app would be a great improvement.
